tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_step_routes_render_step_indicator
tests.trace:
start_reflex_app = None, path = '/wizard/profile', expected_text = 'Step 1 of 4'

    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("path", "expected_text"),
        [
            ("/wizard/profile", "Step 1 of 4"),
            ("/wizard/address", "Step 2 of 4"),
            ("/wizard/preferences", "Step 3 of 4"),
            ("/wizard/review", "Step 4 of 4"),
        ],
    )
    def test_step_routes_render_step_indicator(start_reflex_app, path, expected_text):
        url = f"{FRONTEND_URL}{path}"
        resp = requests.get(url, timeout=30)
        assert resp.status_code == 200, (
            f"Expected HTTP 200 from {url}, got {resp.status_code}. Body: {resp.text[:500]!r}"
        )
>       assert expected_text in resp.text, (
            f"Expected step indicator '{expected_text}' to be present in the response body "
            f"for {url}, but it was not found. First 500 bytes: {resp.text[:500]!r}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Expected step indicator 'Step 1 of 4' to be present in the response body for http://localhost:3000/wizard/profile, but it was not found. First 500 bytes: '<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charSet="utf-8"/><meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" name="viewport"/><link rel="modulepreload" href="/@id/__x00__virtual:react-router/browser-manifest"/><link rel="modulepreload" href="/app/entry.client.js"/><link rel="modulepreload" href="/app/root.jsx"/><script>\n// Only run in browser environment, not during SSR\nif (typeof document !== \'undefined\') {\n    try {\n        const theme = localStorage.getItem("theme") || "system";\n        co'
E       assert 'Step 1 of 4' in '<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charSet="utf-8"/><meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" name=.../script><!--$--><script>window.__reactRouterContext.streamController.close();</script><!--/$--><!--/$--></body></html>'
E        +  where '<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charSet="utf-8"/><meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" name=.../script><!--$--><script>window.__reactRouterContext.streamController.close();</script><!--/$--><!--/$--></body></html>' = <Response [200]>.text

tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_invalid_email_rejected
tests.trace:
start_reflex_app = None

    def test_invalid_email_rejected(start_reflex_app):
        payload = {
            "full_name": "Ada Lovelace",
            "email": "not-an-email",
            "street": "1 Analytical Engine Way",
            "city": "London",
            "postal_code": "12345",
            "newsletter": True,
            "theme": "light",
            "language": "en",
        }
        resp = requests.post(SUBMIT_URL, json=payload, timeout=30)
>       assert resp.status_code == 400, (
            f"Expected HTTP 400 for invalid email, got {resp.status_code}. "
            f"Body: {resp.text[:500]!r}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Expected HTTP 400 for invalid email, got 404. Body: 'Not Found'
E       assert 404 == 400
E        +  where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
